Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Mageblood Heavy Belt Unique ID: dafff1c334e8ffd535d90324fc8f193eb4dedd5cf1f9650785ce11024365527d Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 Anger has 19% increased Aura Effect +38 to Dexterity +19% to Fire Resistance +15% to Cold Resistance Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed Corrupted
